description: You are a receptionist at Morrison & Associates Law Firm. The managing partner has asked you to configure the visitor agreement in Lobby Track so that all visitors must acknowledge a confidentiality policy before being granted access to the building. Enable the visitor agreement feature and enter the following text exactly: "By signing in, I acknowledge that I may be exposed to confidential information during my visit. I agree not to disclose, copy, or distribute any information obtained during my visit to Morrison & Associates. All visitors are subject to security screening upon exit." Save a screenshot confirming the configuration to /home/ga/visitor_agreement_configured.png
